title: Better AI usage Menu
excerpt:
Hi everyone… Please take a look at this screen: 
  
I find rather strange that we get AI features without this screen from the start, and now that we have it, it hardly tell anything that we can use to evaluate the issue…

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone… Please take a look at this screen:

image1498×443 25 KB

I find rather strange that we get AI features without this screen from the start, and now that we have it, it hardly tell anything that we can use to evaluate the issue.

When the cycle begin/end? Wich boards are using AI? etc.

Compare it with the automation dashboard:

image1374×676 31.6 KB

It won’t even fit the screen for print it.

I need detailed data to know wich projects AI is essential is the ones that it is cosmetic.

Hope we get it soon…

Best regards!

posts.author: fnittolo (Fleur Nittolo)
posts.cookedHtml: Knowing how and where the AI credits are applied is a critical feature for understanding AI usage across a company, particularly once we start paying for this

posts.author: allythebell (Alison Bell)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! We are paying for this feature and it is critical to understand our detailed usage in order to see if we need to scale up our limits or if the feature is being misused.
